scoring_legend.note: A Bayesian layer is favored only when benefit dimensions are high AND cost dimensions are low AND the justification criteria all hold simultaneously. High operational/economic_impact alone does not justify probability; it can equally justify a hard rule.

suitability_codes.BAYES_SUITABLE_NOW: All justification criteria currently hold; a probabilistic layer would change a repeated decision today.
suitability_codes.PREMATURE_NEEDS_INSTRUMENTATION: Plausible fit, but no live feedback loop / outcome ledger exists yet; build observation first.
suitability_codes.PREMATURE_SMALL_SAMPLE: Units are exchangeable and observable, but n and/or failure labels are too few for a distribution to beat a rule.
suitability_codes.RULES_SUFFICIENT: A deterministic rule/gate already resolves the decision adequately; probability adds cost, not decisions.
suitability_codes.NOT_EXCHANGEABLE: Decisions are near one-off / non-comparable; no population to learn over.

evidence_anchors.load_batches_cg: AI_SHARED_MEMORY c001 LOADER-FACT-002: cg_audit.batch_registry has 37 batches across KPIONE/KPIONE2/POWER_APP.
evidence_anchors.load_batches_route: AI_SHARED_MEMORY c001 RUTA-FACT-002: ruta_rutero_load_batch rows=19; ruta_rutero_load_rows rows=64346.
evidence_anchors.deterministic_parity: C007 determinism: 3 runs + clean-room produced 1 variant each for key/business/technical hashes; ALERT diff keys=0.
evidence_anchors.snapshot_drift_anomaly: C007 SOURCE_METRIC/VISIT_METRIC: KPIONE2 batch 33 matched legacy while batches 34-38 matched canonical (detected deterministically).
evidence_anchors.deterministic_focos: app/screens/reposicion.py _row_indicadores: Venta(+7)==0, NEGATIVO=='SI', RIESGO DE QUIEBRE=='SI' are boolean flags, no probability.
evidence_anchors.deterministic_alerts: app/screens/control_gestion.py CUMPLE/INCUMPLE derived from capped valid visits vs plan; AI_CAPABILITY_MAP alert_generation is FUTURE_CAPABILITY.
evidence_anchors.no_action_ledger: AI_CAPABILITY_MAP decision_and_action_tracking: current_implementation=[] (no action/outcome write workflow implemented or approved).

use_cases.name: Model / reasoning-effort selection per task class
use_cases.current_decision_process: Implicit operator choice plus protocol roles (Claude proposes, Codex validates); no logged outcome labels per (task_class x agent x effort).
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Verdict (APROBADO/WARN/FAIL) and rework count per task; but task difficulty is an uncontrolled confounder.
use_cases.required_observations: Logged (task_class, agent, effort, outcome, rework) tuples with a difficulty control.
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: ~30 comparable tasks per (task_class x arm) cell; currently far below and cells are heterogeneous.
possible_biases: selection bias (harder tasks routed to stronger arms)
failure_modes: overfitting to a few salient tasks
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Static routing table task_class -> default arm, revised by human review.
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: Contextual bandit / hierarchical Beta-Binomial over arms, ONLY after comparable logging exists.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD now; keep a static routing convention.

use_cases.name: Value of independent Codex validation (validate vs ship)
use_cases.current_decision_process: Protocol mandates independent validation for gated work; effectively a fixed rule.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Defects caught by validation vs defects escaping.
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: ~40 gated tasks with escaped-defect labels; not currently tracked.
failure_modes: under-validating high-risk gated work to chase efficiency
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Keep the hard rule: always validate gated/irreversible work.
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: Expected-value-of-validation model once escaped-defect labels accrue.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; the safety rule dominates for irreversible work.

use_cases.name: Phase ordering / next-gate selection (H0..H5)
use_cases.current_decision_process: Horizon contract + Bastian decision points; each phase is unique and human-gated.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Did the chosen ordering close gates faster / with less rework? Single realization only.
use_cases.required_observations: A population of comparable phase decisions (does not exist).
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: Not attainable; phases are one-off and path-dependent.
failure_modes: false precision over a single trajectory
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Dependency-gated roadmap with explicit Bastian decision points (current).
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; governance gates are the correct instrument.

use_cases.name: Build vs reuse vs retire of a component
use_cases.current_decision_process: Capability map target_state + Codex validation; case-by-case judgement.
use_cases.required_observations: Labeled build/reuse/retire outcomes across many components.
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: Dozens of comparable components; project has a small, heterogeneous set.
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: A short deterministic checklist/scorecard (genericity, consumers, parity risk).
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: None near-term; a checklist scorecard is the proportionate ceiling.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD Bayes; a deterministic scorecard is the most that is warranted.

use_cases.name: Value of information: run one more investigation or stop
use_cases.current_decision_process: Human judgement of marginal evidence value (e.g., absorb C007 then stop).
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Did the extra investigation change a decision? (proxy for VoI)
use_cases.required_observations: Logged investigations with a binary decision-changed flag.
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: A stop rule: stop when the active gate's success criteria are evidenced.
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: Explicit VoI/decision-tree framing as a thinking aid (not a fitted model) later.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; adopt an explicit gate-criteria stop rule.

use_cases.name: Batch load anomaly scoring (row-count / new-key / duplicate / drift bands per source)
use_cases.current_decision_process: Deterministic hash-skip + batch_registry + parity gates; anomaly judged by eyeballing deltas.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Per batch: flagged-as-anomaly vs later-confirmed-problem (parity break, drift, dup explosion).
use_cases.required_observations: Historical batch metrics already in batch_registry + parity evidence; plus a small set of labeled good/bad batches.
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: ~20-30 clean batches per source AND several labeled anomalies per source; current ~12/source CG, ~19 route, with very few failure labels.
possible_biases: look-ahead leakage if labels use post-hoc parity
failure_modes: wide posteriors that never beat a fixed band
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Per-source control charts / fixed percentage bands on row-count delta and duplicate rate (deterministic).
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: HYBRID: hard rules keep loads safe; a Beta-Binomial / Poisson predictive band over per-source batch metrics flags only the uncertain middle. Shadow, read-only, retrospective.
use_cases.recommended_action: OBSERVE_ONLY: this is the strongest seam and the natural home for the observation contract; do not fit a model until labels accrue.

use_cases.name: Schema / grain change risk for a new KPIONE2 format
use_cases.current_decision_process: SOURCE_TO_SHEET mapping + manual analysis of the new format (parallel lane, out of scope).
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Did the schema change break a downstream contract?
use_cases.required_observations: History of schema changes and their breakages (rare events).
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: Too few schema changes to model.
possible_biases: each format change is structurally unique
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: None; contract tests dominate. Also an explicitly excluded parallel lane.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; rely on schema-contract assertions. Out of scope (KPIONE2 lane).

use_cases.name: Safe-load / rollback go-no-go for a refresh
use_cases.current_decision_process: Staged validation before commit; validation failure rolls back (deterministic, already correct).
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Commit vs rollback correctness (already enforced by staged validation).
failure_modes: adding probability where an exact check exists
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: None; a probability would not change a deterministic go-no-go.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; the deterministic gate is correct.

use_cases.name: Operational prioritization (which local/route/SKU to action first)
use_cases.current_decision_process: Deterministic foco counts and rankings (Venta 0 / Negativo / Quiebres / Otros) sorted; human picks.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Did actioning the prioritized item resolve the foco next period?
use_cases.required_observations: Action-taken + next-period foco state (requires action tracking, not built).
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: Many local-cliente-week observations once actions are captured.
possible_biases: no action ledger -> survivorship and attribution confounds
failure_modes: ranking by probability with no closed feedback loop
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Deterministic priority score from foco counts (current).
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: Hierarchical model of resolution probability per foco/local AFTER an action ledger exists.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; depends on a not-yet-built action/outcome ledger and privacy gating.

use_cases.name: Alert -> action efficacy (does a route/person correction fix INCUMPLE?)
use_cases.current_decision_process: No outcome capture; decision_and_action_tracking is FUTURE_CAPABILITY with empty implementation.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Compliance delta in the period after an action vs no action.
use_cases.required_observations: (alert, action, responsible, next-week compliance) tuples; none captured today.
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: Dozens of week-over-week action/outcome pairs per intervention type.
failure_modes: causal claims from observational compliance data
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Descriptive week-over-week compliance delta first (no model).
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: Hierarchical (local-cliente-week) effect model, and only with a proper design, AFTER instrumentation and privacy approval.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD now; highest future potential but blocked on action tracking + privacy + causal design.

use_cases.name: Venta-0 SKU truly-dead vs temporary/artifact classification
use_cases.current_decision_process: Deterministic flag Venta(+7)==0; no probability; human interprets.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Did the SKU stay at zero in subsequent periods (true-dead) vs recover?
use_cases.required_observations: SKU-local sales/stock time series (exists) AND a decision that consumes the probability (does not).
use_cases.minimum_viable_sample: Ample SKU-week history exists; the missing piece is a decision contract, not data.
possible_biases: prediction without a decision is a metric, not decision support
failure_modes: building a forecaster nobody acts on
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Persistence rule: N consecutive zero-sale periods -> review flag (deterministic).
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: Predictive zero-inflated model only if a concrete decision (delist/replace/push) will consume the probability.
use_cases.recommended_action: DO_NOT_BUILD; define the consuming decision first, then prefer a persistence rule.

use_cases.name: Personal learning / time allocation under uncertainty (conceptual contract only)
use_cases.current_decision_process: Out of technical scope; conceptual only. No real personal data is recorded.
use_cases.measurable_outcome: Not measured here; would require private outcome logging.
use_cases.required_observations: None recorded; lane is conceptual and must stay private/git-ignored.
possible_biases: privacy leakage if merged with technical lane
failure_modes: private data entering shared memory or Git
use_cases.simpler_non_bayesian_option: Personal heuristics / journaling kept entirely outside this repository.
use_cases.proposed_method_if_justified: If ever pursued, strictly in private, git-ignored storage, separate from the technical rail.
use_cases.recommended_action: KEEP_CONCEPTUAL_AND_PRIVATE; never write real personal data to Git or shared memory.

aggregate_observations: The single strongest technical seam is UC-DL-01 (batch anomaly), limited today by small sample and sparse failure labels.
The highest future business value (UC-PA-02, UC-PA-01) is blocked on an absent action/outcome ledger and on privacy gating.
AI_WORKFLOW and ENGINEERING decisions are largely non-exchangeable or already rules-sufficient.
Every product/CG decision surface inspected is deterministic by design today (focos, CUMPLE/INCUMPLE).
